gpu.topology:
[4mGPU0	CPU Affinity	NUMA Affinity	GPU NUMA ID[0m
GPU0	 X 	0-23	0		N/A

Legend:

  X    = Self
  SYS  = Connection traversing PCIe as well as the SMP interconnect between NUMA nodes (e.g., QPI/UPI)
  NODE = Connection traversing PCIe as well as the interconnect between PCIe Host Bridges within a NUMA node
  PHB  = Connection traversing PCIe as well as a PCIe Host Bridge (typically the CPU)
  PXB  = Connection traversing multiple PCIe bridges (without traversing the PCIe Host Bridge)
  PIX  = Connection traversing at most a single PCIe bridge
  NV#  = Connection traversing a bonded set of # NVLinks

eval_env:
# =============================================================================
# dev_rtx3090.env — Development Linux machine (i9-12900KF + RTX 3090 24GB)
# =============================================================================

# --- Model ---
MODEL=Qwen/Qwen2.5-1.5B
PORT=8000

# --- Server common ---
GPU_MEMORY_UTIL=0.9
TENSOR_PARALLEL_SIZE=1
TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE=1
HF_DATASETS_OFFLINE=1

# --- Benchmark ---
NUM_PROMPTS=2000
INPUT_LEN=128
OUTPUT_LEN=512
REQUEST_RATE=inf

# --- Hybrid settings ---
# i9-12900KF: 16P+8E cores, no NUMA
# auto-detect: cpu_max_seqs~4, kvcache~24GB, threads~8 (P-cores)
HYBRID_CPU_MAX_SEQS=0
HYBRID_CPU_KVCACHE_GB=0
HYBRID_CPU_THREADS=0
HYBRID_NUMA_AWARE=false          # Single socket, no NUMA
HYBRID_NUM_CPU_ENGINES=1         # Single CPU engine
HYBRID_STATS_LOG_INTERVAL=10
HYBRID_ROUTING_STRATEGY=capacity

# --- Monitoring ---
MONITOR_INTERVAL=1

# --- Results ---
RESULTS_DIR=results

# --- Server startup wait ---
SERVER_READY_TIMEOUT=120
SERVER_READY_POLL=3
